en: Tax is paid when a business provides goods or services to a customer. The rates vary according to the kind of item which is being offered, although it is sometimes difficult to understand why items are taxed at different rates. For example, if you were to buy chocolate covered biscuits, you would pay the standard tax rate of 20%, but if you wanted non- chocolate covered biscuits, the zero rate would apply. Clothes and footwear which are for children are taxed at 0%, while clothes and footwear that are for adults are taxed at 20%.
ja: 税金は、企業が顧客に商品やサービスを提供するときに支払われる。税率は提供される品目の種類によって異なるが、なぜ品目ごとに税率が違うのか、理解しにくいこともある。たとえば、チョコレートでコーティングされたビスケットを買うなら標準税率の20％を払うことになるが、チョコレートのかかっていないビスケットがほしいなら、ゼロ税率が適用される。子ども用の衣服や靴は0％で課税されるのに対し、大人用の衣服や靴は20％で課税されるのだ。

questions.q: 第2文の "the kind of item which is being offered" にある "is being offered" と文法的に同じ形・働きで being が使われている文はどれか。
questions.a: He is being very kind to everyone today.
questions.b: A new library is being built near the station.
questions.c: She is afraid of being laughed at by others.
questions.d: Being very tired, he went to bed early.
questions.explanation: "is being offered" は「be動詞 + being + 過去分詞」で、受動態の進行形(今まさに提供されている)。bの "is being built"(今まさに建てられている)が同じ形です。cも being + 過去分詞ですが、これは前置詞 of の後ろに置かれた動名詞であり、aは「be + being + 形容詞」、dは分詞構文なので働きが異なります。

questions.tag: 用法識別(仮定法 were to)
questions.q: 第3文 "if you were to buy chocolate covered biscuits, you would pay the standard tax rate of 20%" の if節が表す条件と、同じ種類の条件を表している文はどれか。
questions.a: If it is sunny tomorrow, we will play tennis in the park.
questions.b: If you heat water to 100 degrees, it boils.
questions.c: If he calls me tonight, please tell me right away.
questions.d: If I had a lot of money, I would buy a house with a garden.
questions.explanation: "were to buy ... would pay" は仮定法で、「仮に買うとしたら」とあくまで想像上の話として述べる形です。同じく「過去形 + would」で仮の話を述べているdが正解。訳の「買うなら」という字面につられて、aのような単なる未来の条件(直説法)と混同しないよう注意しましょう。bは一般法則、cは命令文につながる普通の条件です。

questions.tag: 用法識別(形式主語 it)
questions.q: 第2文の "although it is sometimes difficult to understand why items are taxed at different rates" にある "it" と同じ使い方の it を含む文はどれか。
questions.a: It is dangerous to swim in this river alone.
questions.b: It got dark before we reached the hotel.
questions.c: This cake looks delicious, so I want to eat it.
questions.d: It was my brother that broke the window yesterday.
questions.explanation: この it は後ろの to understand 以下を指す形式主語(仮主語)で、「〜を理解することが難しい」という意味を作ります。aの it も to swim 以下を指す形式主語なので同じ使い方です。bは明暗・天候などを表す it、cは前に出た名詞を受ける代名詞、dは It is ... that の強調構文なので、どれも働きが違います。
